summary.label: Xponge safety layer
summary.detail: Soil-free root-zone evidence tracks disease pressure, pest complaints and chemical treatment events.
summary.detailZh: 用无土根区证据追踪病害压力、虫害投诉和用药干预。

summary.label: Workplace wellbeing
summary.detail: Mood, stress, focus and space comfort are tracked as workplace indicators, not unverified productivity claims.
summary.detailZh: 把心情、压力、专注和空间舒适作为职场指标，而不是直接夸大为效率结论。

summary.label: Green brand asset
summary.detail: Reception, showroom, clinic and club greenery become auditable brand touchpoints.
summary.detailZh: 前台、展厅、诊所和会所绿化变成可证明的品牌触点。

summary.label: ESG fit
summary.detail: The app supports ESG reporting evidence; formal certifications still require qualified assurance.
summary.detailZh: 系统支持 ESG 披露证据，正式认证仍需合资格鉴证。

pillars.label: Xponge Health & Safety
pillars.value: Less disease pressure, fewer chemical interventions
pillars.body: The soil-free substrate story is operationalized as a hygiene and maintenance-risk layer for Hong Kong FM sites.
pillars.esgLink: Supports Environmental chemical-reduction evidence and Social indoor-health perception evidence.
pillars.claimBoundary: Xponge-specific performance should be backed by product datasheets, material tests or controlled service records before external claims.

pillars.label: Workplace Wellbeing Impact
pillars.body: The system turns green space into a measurable workplace experience program for staff-facing environments.
pillars.esgLink: Supports Social value evidence through occupant feedback, HR/FM notes and space-use context.
pillars.claimBoundary: Use 'supports employee experience' until the client connects survey results with HR or productivity data.

pillars.label: Green Brand Asset Value
pillars.value: Visible green proof for clients and visitors
pillars.body: High-touch spaces become green brand media with service proof, design intent and client-safe ESG language.
pillars.esgLink: Supports governance and communication quality because every public claim links back to operational evidence.
pillars.claimBoundary: Use as brand and stakeholder communication evidence; do not present it as official ESG certification.

metrics.label: Soil-free coverage
metrics.body: Each wall can record whether pods use Xponge sleeves rather than loose soil.

metrics.label: Chemical treatment events
metrics.body: Routine chemical spray should be logged as an exception requiring approval, not a hidden maintenance habit.

metrics.label: Pest complaint count
metrics.body: FM complaint logs can show whether soil-free assets reduce insects, odor and mess perception.

metrics.label: Mood and focus pulse
metrics.body: Short monthly staff questions can capture mood, stress relief, focus and space satisfaction.

metrics.label: Space comfort score
metrics.body: Combines user feedback, spatial diagnosis and health score rather than relying on one survey answer.

metrics.label: Green touchpoint score
metrics.body: Scores whether the asset is visible, healthy, on-brand and ready for client-facing communication.

metrics.label: Approved media proof
metrics.body: Photos, captions and report excerpts need consent and evidence links before brand use.

clientAssessments.note: Strong reception visibility and stable health score make this a credible employee and client-facing proof site.
Clean, soil-free maintenance and calm greenery are especially relevant for clinic trust and perceived comfort.
Brand value is high, but health recovery and lighting stability must improve before premium ESG storytelling.
Stable lounge greenery supports member comfort and recurring green brand exposure.

workflow.body: Record Xponge sleeve coverage, substrate batch, pest/disease history and whether chemical treatment was used.
Collect short client-approved pulse questions on mood, stress, focus, comfort or visit impression.
Identify where clients, staff or visitors actually see the asset and whether the wall is photo/report ready.
Mark each statement as measured, surveyed, estimated or not claimed before it enters reports.

evidencePack.label: Xponge substrate log
evidencePack.body: Links asset, pod, sleeve batch, replacement date and no-soil installation proof.
evidencePack.proof: Asset ledger + install photo + replacement record

evidencePack.label: Pest and disease ledger
evidencePack.body: Tracks issue type, severity, root-zone notes, treatment decision and follow-up result.
evidencePack.proof: Service work order + issue photo + closure note

evidencePack.label: Chemical intervention control
evidencePack.body: Makes any pesticide or chemical treatment visible, approved and reportable as an exception.
evidencePack.proof: Approval log + safety note + treated zone photo

evidencePack.label: Workplace pulse survey
evidencePack.body: Client-approved lightweight survey captures perceived calmness, stress relief, focus and space satisfaction.

evidencePack.label: Green brand touchpoint proof
evidencePack.body: Connects a visible green asset to design intent, approved photos and client-safe ESG language.
evidencePack.proof: Same-angle photo + designer note + usage permission

evidencePack.label: Impact claim register
evidencePack.body: Separates measured evidence, survey findings, estimates and blocked claims before investor or client use.

claimControls.label: Allowed: lower-risk maintenance evidence
claimControls.labelZh: 可主张：低风险维护证据
claimControls.body: Use pest/disease logs, no-soil coverage and chemical intervention records as supplier evidence.

claimControls.label: Allowed with survey method: employee experience
claimControls.labelZh: 可带方法说明：员工体验
claimControls.body: Use staff pulse results when question wording, response count, client scope and period are visible.

claimControls.label: Allowed: green brand communication asset
claimControls.labelZh: 可主张：绿色品牌传播资产
claimControls.body: Use approved photos, design intent and touchpoint score to support brand and stakeholder communication.

claimControls.label: Blocked: direct productivity or medical claims
claimControls.labelZh: 禁止：直接效率或医疗主张
claimControls.body: Do not claim productivity improvement, disease prevention, medical benefit or certified ESG impact without qualified evidence.
